Off Calendar Jul-07-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF JOSEPH SCHMITT.

The court's inclination is to grant the motion. Moving party must provide a proposed order on the judicial council form.

Order submitted.
